item.title: New 2025 Forest River RV Salem Grand Villa 44VIEW
item.g:vehicle_option: Front Bedroom,Kitchen Island,Loft,Rear Bath,Two Entry/Exit Doors
item.g:description: Forest River Salem Grand Villa destination trailer 44VIEW highlights: Front & Rear Loft Kitchen Island with Four Seats Custom King Bed with Versa-Tilt Fireplace Dual Entry Doors You will feel like you are home when you step inside! Not only will you be impressed with the large slide in the main combined kitchen and living area, but check out the island with four seats! The main entry closest to the front features a step up to a private bedroom featuring a custom king bed with Versa-Tilt within a slide, plus a fireplace, wardrobe, and a dress for your belongings. Just outside this door is a half bath around the corner and a spiral staircase to the front loft with two 42" x 74" bunk mats above. The kitchen is fully equipped for you to provide the best home cooked meals with a roll-out pantry , range and microwave, plus side-by-side refrigerator all part of the large slide that also houses an L-shaped sectional sofa with ottoman so everyone can have a seat! Opposite the sectional find an entertainment center with pop-up TV and fireplace. A second set of stairs leads up to the rear loft featuring a 62" x 74" Versa Queen mattress and a dresser. Back down in the very back of the unit, there is a large bathroom with a walk-in shower, linen cabinet, toilet, and vanity with a sink. There is also a space that has washer/dryer prep to add even more convenience. Outside, a 26' awning for outdoor living, and double entry doors to make it easy to move in and out. With any Salem Grand Villa destination trailer by Forest River, you can call home wherever you park it! There is a heated and enclosed Accessibelly for added protection in all seasons, LED "Blade Lighting" under the awning, Lippert On-The-Go ladder prep, plus many more exterior conveniences. Elegant curtain rods and curtains will have you feeling right at home, along with stainless steel kitchen appliances, stylish roller shades, and enhanced floating shelves for added storage. Each model includes a central vacuum with a

item.title: New 2026 Forest River RV Salem Grand Villa 42ICE
item.g:vehicle_option: Front Bedroom,Kitchen Island,Loft,Rear Bath,Two Entry/Exit Doors
item.g:description: Forest River Salem Grand Villa destination trailer 42ICE highlights: Two Lofts Steps to Loft Televator Walk-in Shower This trailer is built with comfort and convenience in mind, offering plenty of sleeping space for the whole gang. It has two spacious lofts, each equipped with two 42" x 72" bunk mats , plus an extra 36" x 38" bunk mat, providing cozy sleeping spots for everyone. Each loft also includes built-in storage for essentials, and instead of climbing a ladder, easy stair access makes getting in and out much safer. On the main floor, you’ll find a full rear bathroom with a walk-in shower and washer/dryer prep. The main living area has a large sectional sofa , perfect for gathering the group to watch the TV on the Televator or relaxing by the fireplace after a day outdoors. The kitchen is equipped with all the essentials, including a large pantry, overhead cabinets for snack storage, a fridge, and a kitchen island that adds prep space. Up front, the private bedroom has a king bed with Versa Tilt , a dresser, and shelves to keep your clothes and camp gear neatly organized. Regardless that you're adventuring about, this trailer is ready to make every trip feel like home. With any Salem Grand Villa destination trailer by Forest River, you can call home wherever you park it! There is a heated and enclosed Accessibelly for added protection, LED "Blade Lighting" under the awning, Lippert On-The-Go ladder prep, plus many more exterior conveniences. Elegant curtain rods and curtains will have you feeling right at home, along with stainless steel kitchen appliances, stylish roller shades, and enhanced floating shelves for added storage. Each model includes heavy duty cabinet hinges for safety and durability, a 60k on-demand tankless water heater for endless hot showers, a JBL 3-Zone media center , plus available options to further customize your trailer.

item.title: New 2027 Forest River RV Puma Vista 403LFT
item.g:description: Forest River Puma Vista destination trailer 403LFT highlights: Four Slide Outs Double Loft Areas King Bed Slide Out Dual Entry Doors Front Kitchen This is the perfect destination trailer for a larger group since it can sleep up to nine campers each night. The little ones will love the double loft areas with three bunk mats and storage space for their things, while you take the rear private bedroom. There is a king bed slide out here, along with a wardrobe/closet for your clothes, plus a second closet with washer and dryer prep. Everyone can meet in the middle living room to relax on the dual opposing sofas or theater seating across from the fireplace and entertainment center. Head to the front of the unit where you'll find the kitchen that includes ample counter space to prep meals, a residential style refrigerator and pantry for food storage, and a free-standing table to dine at. There is also a breakfast nook that overlooks the living area so you can visit with the cook and watch a movie at the same time! Each Puma Vista destination trailer by Forest River is designed to give you unforgettable getaways to the destination of your choice! The Value Shopper Package features Congoleum linoleum , LED lighting, an AM/FM/Bluetooth stereo, and a tankless water heater to name a few comforts. There are also solid surface countertops , a 12V ceiling fan in the living room, an outside shower, two exterior speakers , and more amenities found within the Vista Marquis and Vista LFT Loft Packages!

item.title: New 2025 Coachmen RV Brookstone 318RLL
item.g:description: Coachmen Brookstone fifth wheel 318RLL highlights: Free-Standing Table Covered Patio Entertainment Center Pantry/Linen Closet Shower with a Seat King Bed Slide Out Step outside and enjoy the fresh air on our covered patio, complete with a refrigerator and optional L-shaped sofa, which is the perfect place to relax and unwind after a long day of adventure. Inside, the kitchen/living room area will make you feel an at-home experience, featuring overhead cabinets, an entertainment center, theater seating , a free-spanning table, a kitchen island, a microwave, a refrigerator, and a pantry. Perfect for cooking up a storm, entertaining friends and family, or simply relaxing and enjoying the comforts of home. The full bathroom is a spacious oasis, complete with a shower with a seat, a linen closet, and more. Plus, with a front bedroom featuring a king bed, dresser, washer and dryer prep, and a large wardrobe , you'll have the perfect place to rest and recharge after a long day of adventure. With two entry/exit doors and a massive 20’ awning, you'll have easy access to the RV and plenty of shade and protection from the weather. The Brookstone fifth wheels by Coachmen are coming to you with wide-body comfort, home-like amenities, and unique designs for a truly luxurious RV. The Weather Shield+ consists of a 6X double Azdel aluminum cage sidewall system, a Radiant Pro weather barrier system, and more that will help you extend your camping season or go full-time. Head inside to find solid surface countertops in the kitchen, an 4K Smart LED TV in the living room, slow rise roller night shades , and the list of comforts goes on! The Brookstone also includes 6-point electric auto-leveling, four Solid Step entry steps , an electric awning with LED lights, and many more exterior conveniences!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite 368TBH
item.g:vehicle_option: Bunkhouse,Front Bedroom,Outdoor Kitchen,Rear Bath,Two Full Baths
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheel 368TBH highlights: Private Bunkhouse Front Private Bedroom Two Full Bathrooms Single Slide Outside Kitchen This fifth wheel is big enough for the whole gang! The kiddos will love having their own private bunkhouse which has 30" x 74" bunks and its very own full bathroom complete with a wardrobe. Enjoy your own privacy with the front private bedroom with a queen bed, dual nightstands, plus roller night shades for privacy. You can even transform the tri-fold hide-a-bed sofa into an extra sleeping space and the free-spanning table offers a comfortable place to play card games. The chef can either prepare their delicious meals indoors with the GE Profile 21" stainless steel oven with a residential cooktop or breathe in some fresh air while cooking at the outside kitchen while staying protected by the 18' electric awning! Comfort, convenience, and an easy haul is what you will find with each one of these Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheels! Their Tri-Tex powder coated frame technology is up to 5X more weather resistant, and the dual-sided Azdel composite sidewall panels are ultra durable. The Equa-Flex suspension provides hassle-free towing, and you might want to add the exterior back-up and sideview camera prep for easy parking. You will feel right at home inside with slow rise blackout roller night shades, an upgraded Carbon and Walnut entertainment center , a modern high-rise kitchen faucet, and many more comforts! The exterior is just as inviting with its electric awning with LED lights, MORryde StepAbove entry steps , and pass-through storage for all your gear!

item.title: New 2026 Forest River RV Flagstaff Classic F361RLS
item.g:description: Forest River Flagstaff Classic fifth wheel F361RLS highlights: Theater Seating Center Island Fireplace Shower with a Seat Ample Exterior Storage Get ready to enjoy the outdoors while inside with the spacious windows in both the rear and the door side slide of this fifth wheel. The main living area offers dual opposing slides giving you a great place to invite other RVers over to visit, eat, and even play cards. There is seating for nine from the table and chairs with a bench , the theater seats, and the rear hide-a-bed sofa . The cook will have a 12V refrigerator to store lots of drinks and cold food, plus a pantry, and the center island offers extra counter space plus seating. After everyone has left, retire to the front bedroom with a king bed slide , dresser, wardrobe, plus washer and dryer prep if you plan to go full-time! Each one of these Forest River Flagstaff Classic fifth wheels or travel trailers will be your home on wheels! Their quality craftsmanship and attention to detail shines through the enclosed underbelly, the fully laminated walkable roof , and six-sided full-aluminum frame. Towing your unit will be easy with the Goodyear Endurance tires plus RoadTech tire pressure monitoring . Additional exterior features include a 200W solar panel , slam baggage doors, a Key-Alike lock system, and double 30 lb. LP tanks to name a few conveniences. Head inside to find a residential style gas range , solid surface kitchen and bath countertops, soft close hidden cabinet hinges, and more comforts!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite 218SE
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheel 218SE highlights: Front Private Bunkhouse Double Slide Outs Rear Master Bedroom 20' Electric Awning with LED Lights You'll love the amount of space you'll have in this fifth wheel thanks to the double slides! Once you arrive at the campground, you can start lunch in the full kitchen, then dine at the J-lounge with a table and bench seat. There is also theater seating within the living room slide for added space and comfort. Your guests can claim the front bunkhouse to themselves, which includes two bunk beds with a wardrobe below for clothes and shoes. The rear master bedroom will have you feeling right at home with a queen bed slide out and quick access into the full bath! Comfort, convenience, and an easy haul is what you will find with each one of these Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheels! You will feel right at home inside with slow rise blackout roller night shades, an upgraded Carbon and Walnut entertainment center , a modern high-rise kitchen faucet, and many more comforts! The exterior is just as inviting with its electric awning with LED lights, MORryde StepAbove entry steps, and pass-through storage for all your gear!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Brookstone 374RK
item.g:description: Coachmen Brookstone fifth wheel 374RK highlights: Rear Kitchen Four Slides Entertainment Center Dual Sink Vanity Outside Refrigerator King Bed Slide Out One look at this fifth wheel and you'll be sold. You'll find tons of counter space in the rear kitchen along with a kitchen island , a large pantry, and a hutch for even more storage. Visit in the main living area on the two theater seats and tri-fold sofa, or you may want to head outdoors under the two power awnings ! There is even an outside refrigerator here to entertain guests. The spacious full bath will allow you to clean up after a day of adventuring, and here you'll find a full-size shower with sliding glass doors and a seat, plus a dual sink vanity. The front private bedroom will feel just like home with its king bed slide out, large wardrobe, and dresser to keep your clothes tidy. The Brookstone fifth wheels by Coachmen are coming to you with wide-body comfort, home-like amenities, and unique designs for a truly luxurious RV. The Weather Shield+ consists of a 6X double Azdel aluminum cage sidewall system, a Radiant Pro weather barrier system, and more that will help you extend your camping season or go full-time. Head inside to find solid surface countertops in the kitchen, an 4K Smart LED TV in the living room, slow rise roller night shades , and the list of comforts goes on! The Brookstone also includes 6-point electric auto-leveling, four Solid Step entry steps , an electric awning with LED lights, and many more exterior conveniences!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Brookstone 370RLLO
item.g:description: Coachmen Brookstone fifth wheel 370RLLO highlights: Free-Standing Table 78" Tri-Fold Hide-A-Bed Sofa Entertainment Center Pantry/Linen Closet Shower with a Seat King Bed Slide Out The rear living room is the perfect place to unwind, featuring a 78” trifold sofa, theater seating, overhead cabinets, and an entertainment center. Whether you're watching a movie, reading a book, or simply enjoying the company of loved ones, this room has everything you need to relax and recharge. The spacious kitchen is fitted with a kitchen island , refrigerator, microwave, free-standing table, hutch, and overhead cabinets. Perfect for preparing your favorite meals and enjoy with family. With a convenient coat bench, desk with flip-up storage , washer, and dryer, you'll have everything you need to stay organized and comfortable on the go. The full bathroom is an enormous oasis with a linen closet for added convenience. Also with a front bedroom featuring a king bed, dresser, shelves, and wardrobe , you'll have the perfect place to rest and recharge after a long day of adventure, also plenty of space for storing all your belongings and staying organized on the road. The Brookstone fifth wheels by Coachmen are coming to you with wide-body comfort, home-like amenities, and unique designs for a truly luxurious RV. The Weather Shield+ consists of a 6X double Azdel aluminum cage sidewall system, a Radiant Pro weather barrier system, and more that will help you extend your camping season or go full-time. The Brookstone also includes 6-point electric auto-leveling, four Solid Step entry steps , an electric awning with LED lights, and many more exterior conveniences!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite 27BAR
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheel 27BAR higlights: Exterior Flip-Out bar Hidden Swing-Out pantry Multi-functional slide/swivel table Front Master Suite Enjoy the features this fifth wheeler has to offer for your next roadtrip! Have a great time with friends and family while you appreciate the pleasent outdoor view and enjoy some drinks at the table height fixed bar , or have a relaxing rest on the spacious j-lounge sofa that can turn into a bed so you can kick back and relax however you prefer. You can also enjoy a treat stored conveniently in the hidden swing-out pantry to maximize space and have easy access when craving a snack before enjoying some TV. Here you will find a front bedroom that includes great options for storage including a wardrobe to keep all your clothes wrinkle-free, after a day of adventure, refresh and recharge in your bathroom complete with a radius shower , modern fixtures, and everything you need to unwind before settling into your cozy queen bed . Comfort, convenience, and an easy haul is what you will find with each one of these Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheels! Their Tri-Tex powder coated frame technology is up to 5X more weather resistant, and the dual-sided Azdel composite sidewall panels are ultra durable. The Equa-Flex suspension provides hassle-free towing, and you might want to add the exterior back-up and sideview camera prep for easy parking. You will feel right at home inside with slow rise blackout roller night shades, an upgraded Carbon and Walnut entertainment center , a modern high-rise kitchen faucet, and many more comforts! The exterior is just as inviting with its electric awning with LED lights, MORryde StepAbove entry steps , and pass-through storage for all your gear!

item.title: New 2026 Forest River RV Puma Grand Mesa 394RKL
item.g:description: Forest River Puma Grand Mesa fifth wheel 394RKL highlights: Five Slides Rear Kitchen Table with Half Booth L-Lounge King Bed Slide You will love every minute spent in this unique fifth wheel! As you enter the unit, you'll find a mud room with a bench seat, storage, plus washer and dryer prep. The front master bedroom will be your own oasis each day since there is an office space with a desk slide out and a hallway that leads to the front bedroom. Here, you'll find a king bed slide, a front bench, plus a slide out with a TV, fireplace and wardrobe; how convenient! When you've worked up an appetite, the rear kitchen includes everything you need to make home-cooked meals, along with a bar top that overlooks the living room , a spacious pantry, and a table with chairs to dine at. You can spend your evenings relaxing on the L-lounge by the entertainment center with a fireplace, or you can head outdoors to sit under the 19' power awning with LED lights ! With the Puma Grand Mesa fifth wheel by Forest River, you will love the practical living, ample storage, the optimum towability, and the lavish style found throughout! There is a 7' interior height and a 101" wide body for added space, plus large, tinted windows throughout, worry-free composite floors, and vacuum bonded walls with Azdel for durability. The mandatory River Package includes features such as an upgraded suspension, a screenless operating system with Bluetooth, and three A/C units to keep you comfortable. These fifth wheels also include the mandatory Ranch Package that comes with a stainless-steel appliance package, day/night roller shades, a fiberglass shower surround, plus residential style dinette chairs. There are many more features to love about the Puma Grand Mesa fifth wheels, like the upgraded true solid surface countertops, the mirrored sliding closet doors, and the two-tone painted front cap !

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Chaparral 336TSIK
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral mid-profile fifth wheel 336TSIK highlights: Dual Opposing Slides Free-Spanning Table Bedroom Dresser Extra Deep Single Basin Sink Tri-Fold Sofa Are you wanting to trade out your busy work weeks for relaxing vacations? This fifth wheel can give you just that! Once you arrive at your destination, set up the 16' power awning with LED lights and enjoy some fresh air before you unpack your bags. The chef can start lunch on the GE Profile 21" oven with a residential cooktop, and there is an island with two barstools if the little ones want to color while they wait on their food. This model also includes a large pantry plus extra counter space with overhead storage for dishes. Everyone can take turns cleaning up in the full bath that includes a spacious shower and a linen closet to keep clean towels close by. When it's time to call it a night, you'll enjoy the king bed slide out in the front bedroom, while your guests take the rear tri-fold hide-a-bed sofa! The Tri-Tex™ powder coated frame technology is up to 5X more weather resistant, and the Equa-Flex® suspension with 1/2" thick anodized shackles, bronze bushings, and greasable Zerk® fittings will make towing easier than ever. There is also a Solar Source +™ package with an upgraded 200W roof-mounted solar panel , along with an upgraded lithium-ready converter and 30AMP charge controller by Rich Solar® to support off-grid capability. To top it off, the 6X™ Double Azdel® aluminum cage sidewall system helps deliver a strong, vacuum-bonded build, while the upgraded Carbon & Walnut entertainment center with JBL® soundbar adds a premium touch. Now that's what I call luxury! Choose a Chaparral fifth wheel today!

item.title: New 2026 Keystone RV Arcadia Super Lite 260SLCL
item.g:description: Keystone Arcadia Super Lite fifth wheel 260SLCL highlights: Rear Kitchen Theater Seating Full Bath Wardrobe Slide Out 19' Power Awning You're sure to love every minute spent in this rear kitchen fifth wheel! There is generous counter space to prep your best meals plus a pull-out dinette table where you can dine together. Additional seating space can be found on the theater seating and hide-a-bed sofa . There is even a fireplace to make this space more cozy. If you enjoy spending time outdoors, there is a Grill-N-Chill outdoor kitchen , 19' power awning, and Composite Stow Away solid steps. When it's time to call it a night, the queen bed in the private bedroom is sure to be calling your name! With any Arcadia Super Lite fifth wheel by Keystone, you will enjoy e asy-to-tow lengths , unmatched storage, and plenty of windows to let the outdoor views in. The structural I-beam frame will provide a strong foundation to your RV, and the Full pass-through storage for all your equipment and camping gear. You will be able to camp in cold and hot climates thanks to the Peak Weather Package that includes a heated and enclosed underbelly, two Furrion A/C for cool temperatures in the summer, and Keystone's exclusive HyperDeck floor that adds an additional layer of insulation to your floor. The interior will make you feel at home with residential hardware, seamless pressed countertops , black roller shades, and ample storage space. Sometimes the best things come in smaller packages; choose a Arcadia Super Lite today!

item.title: New 2026 Coachmen RV Chaparral 381DBL
item.g:vehicle_option: Front Bedroom,Kitchen Island,Loft,Rear Bath,Two Full Baths
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral mid-profile fifth wheel 381DBL highlights: Loft Kitchen Island Theater Seating Two Master Suites Hutch One look at this fifth wheel and you'll be sold! There are an impressive two master suites; one up front with a queen bed and full bath, and one towards the back with a king bed slide and second full bath ! There are even dual bath sinks in the rear bath for added convenience! The middle living area includes dual opposing slides, a tri-fold sofa, plus theater seating and a free-spanning table for ample seating, dining, and sleeping space. There is also an entertainment center with a 50" 4K Smart LED TV to wash away those rainy day blues. The chef of your crew will have a GE Profile 21" stainless steel oven with a residential cooktop and a GE Profile stainless residential microwave to cook meals each day, a kitchen island for more counter space, and a 16 cu. ft. side-by-side 12V refrigerator for food storage. The Tri-Tex™ powder coated frame technology is up to 5X more weather resistant, and the Equa-Flex® suspension with 1/2" thick anodized shackles, bronze bushings, and greasable Zerk® fittings will make towing easier than ever. There is also a Solar Source +™ package with an upgraded 200W roof-mounted solar panel , along with an upgraded lithium-ready converter and 30AMP charge controller by Rich Solar® to support off-grid capability. To top it off, the 6X™ Double Azdel® aluminum cage sidewall system helps deliver a strong, vacuum-bonded build, while the upgraded Carbon & Walnut entertainment center with JBL® soundbar adds a premium touch. Now that's what I call luxury! Choose a Chaparral fifth wheel today!

item.title: New 2026 Forest River RV Salem Hemisphere 380WDR
item.g:vehicle_option: Bath and a Half,Front Bath,Kitchen Island,Rear Living Area
item.g:description: Forest River Salem Hemisphere fifth wheel 380WDR highlights: Bath and a Half Custom King Bed Slide Designated Desk Space Rear Tri-Fold Sofa One look at this fifth wheel and you'll be sold! You can wake up each morning in the master bedroom that includes a custom king bed and a dresser with an ottoman. The front full bath has two bath sinks so you both can get ready at once, and you're going to love the walk-in wardrobe with wrap-around hanging rod. A half bath includes a floating shelf with a hanging rod plus washer/dryer prep, giving you the option to make this a laundry room! The back of this unit is where you can cook meals with full kitchen amenities, dine at the kitchen island with four chairs, and relax on the theater seating and tri-fold sofa. A 50" TV and fireplace is also found here, complete with hidden storage behind for board games, movies, and snacks! The Salem Hemisphere fifth wheels by Forest River are packed with features, while still being value-minded! Each model is constructed with laminated "Aluma Frame" sidewalls and floor with block foam insulation plus full-length barreled ceilings for added head space. There are LED awning, marker and taillights outside, along with an extra-large pass-thru storage with slam latch baggage doors, plus solar prep and Lippert On-The-Go ladder prep. The 60K on-demand tankless water heater will provide endless hot showers, and the JBL sound system includes a head unit plus interior and exterior speakers to keep the party going. There are also many interior comforts found throughout that will make you feel right at home!

item.title: New 2027 Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite 30RLS
item.g:description: Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheel 30RLS highlights: Front Master Suite Rear Living Area Kitchen Island Dual Entry Bathroom Large Pantry Get ready for a luxurious getaway in this fifth wheel! The rear living area is the perfect place to wind down your nights by relaxing on either the 78" tri-fold hide-a-bed sofa or the theater seating across from the entertainment center. You could even play a few card games at the free-spanning table while enjoying snacks that were stored in the pantry. The kitchen island comes with two bar stools so you can have two helpers get dinner ready while you're cooking on the three burner cooktop. The dual entry bathroom is easy for everyone to access and has a radius shower with glass doors to freshen up in, plus it leads directly into the front master suite where you will find a queen bed to lay your head on at night and a wardrobe/linen slide to keep your clothes looking their best! Comfort, convenience, and an easy haul is what you will find with each one of these Coachmen RV Chaparral Lite fifth wheels! Their Tri-Tex powder coated frame technology is up to 5X more weather resistant, and the dual-sided Azdel composite sidewall panels are ultra durable. The Equa-Flex suspension provides hassle-free towing, and you might want to add the exterior back-up and sideview camera prep for easy parking. You will feel right at home inside with slow rise blackout roller night shades, an upgraded Carbon and Walnut entertainment center , a modern high-rise kitchen faucet, and many more comforts! The exterior is just as inviting with its electric awning with LED lights, MORryde StepAbove entry steps , and pass-through storage for all your gear!

item.title: New 2027 Forest River RV Salem Hemisphere 373MBRL

item.title: Used 2023 Jayco Eagle HT 28.5RSTS
item.g:vehicle_option: Front Bedroom,Kitchen Island,Outdoor Kitchen,Rear Living Area
item.g:description: Jayco Eagle HT fifth wheel 28.5RSTS highlights: Kitchen Island Front Private Bedroom Fireplace USB Charging Ports Outside Shower Outside Kitchen Don't pass up your chance to camp in true comfort with this fifth wheel! It features a rear living area with a tri-fold sofa for an afternoon nap and theater seating across from the entertainment center with a fireplace. The chef can choose to either prepare their meals indoors with the kitchen island and the three burner stainless steel range or at the outside kitchen with a refrigerator to enjoy a cold beverage while cooking. Hang your coats in the entry wardrobe and store your canned goods in the kitchen pantry. The dual entry bathroom has a radius shower to clean up in and is easy to access, especially those staying in the front private bedroom. The bedroom also has a wardrobe slide with a dresser and linen closet, as well as wardrobes on either side of the queen bed! The Jayco Eagle HT fifth wheels and travel trailers include many features to make camping easier than ever! They are lightweight, making them easy to tow, and the JAYCOMMAND "Smart RV" system lets you control your RV's functions from a tablet or smartphone! Each model is constructed with Stronghold VBL lamination, the lightest, yet strongest in the industry, along with a durable Magnum Truss roof system that can withstand 4,500 lbs. The 4 Star Handling Package includes Goodyear Endurance tires, Dexter axles with Nev-R-Adjust brakes and E-Z lube hubs, and a MORryde CRE-3000 rubberized suspension for hassle-free towing. Head inside to find handcrafted and glazed doors, drawers, and trim, residential vinyl flooring, blackout roller shades, plus many more at-home comforts. These models are also pre-wired for an inverter and you can add the optional solar packages to enjoy off-grid camping when the adventure calls for it!

The bedroom features a queen bed , creating a cozy retreat that still leaves room to move comfortably around the space. In the rear bedroom, a dedicated vanity adds a touch of everyday convenience, giving you a practical place. The full bathroom offers everything you need in one well-designed space, helping the coach feel more like home than a camper. Outside, generous pass-thru storage makes it easy to bring along larger gear, tools, or outdoor furniture while keeping the interior clean and uncluttered. Each one of these Forest River Flagstaff Classic fifth wheels or travel trailers will be your home on wheels! Their quality craftsmanship and attention to detail shines through the enclosed underbelly, the fully laminated walkable roof , and six-sided full-aluminum frame. Towing your unit will be easy with the Goodyear Endurance tires plus RoadTech tire pressure monitoring . Additional exterior features include a 200W solar panel , slam baggage doors, a Key-Alike lock system, and double 30 lb. LP tanks to name a few conveniences. Head inside to find a residential style gas range , solid surface kitchen and bath countertops, soft close hidden cabinet hinges, and more comforts!

item.title: New 2027 Forest River RV Salem Hemisphere 286RL

You will also love the outdoor camp kitchen for a sunrise breakfast! Each one of these Forest River Salem Cruise Lite travel trailers offer quality and value with a full list of great features! They are built with a fully walkable, one piece SuperFlex roof , a powder coated I-beam frame, a cambered chassis, and has R-7 fiberglass insulation throughout to keep the heat in during the winter and the cool air in from the 13.5k A/C during the summer. The aerodynamic front radius profile makes it easier to tow these units, and the diamond plate rock guard will keep your unit protected while traveling down the road. Some of the new features you will enjoy are the upgraded door pulls, the skylight over the shower, the roof-mounted solar prep , and much more!

item.title: New 2026 Keystone RV Bullet Crossfire 208MKS
item.g:description: Keystone Bullet Crossfire travel trailer 208MKS highlights: Fireplace Large Pantry Front Bedroom Microwave Oven Exterior Awning Unwind in the full bathroom, then head to the kitchen with a fridge, pantry , cubbies, sink, overhead cabinets, and microwave - perfect for whipping up meals. Curl up by the fireplace or enjoy movie nights in the luxury cinema theater seating area with two comfy chairs. The front queen bed is a cozy retreat, with two wardrobes for storing clothes. And with a small fridge nearby, you've got snacks at arm's reach. Whether it's a quick escape or a long adventure, this trailer's got the comforts of home - and then some! The Bullet Crossfire by Keystone are the perfect lightweight travel travel for rookie campers to seasoned RVers! Each one is built with a one-piece polypropylene underbelly, a fully walkable roof, and a high impact thermoset resin painted front cap for added durability. There is also a Dexter Torsion axle rubber ride suspension and Goodyear Endurance tires for a smooth tow plus a power tongue jack and power stabilizer jacks for easy set up. The interior will have you feeling right at home with deluxe night shades, updated Tranquil Timber decor, residential Beauflor vinyl flooring , and seamless kitchen countertops.

item.title: New 2027 Forest River RV Salem Cruise Lite 273QBXL
item.g:description: Forest River Salem Cruise Lite travel trailer 273QBXL highlights: Fireplace Bunk Beds Booth Dinette Custom King Bed with Versa Tilt This versatile bunkhouse travel trailer is big enough for the whole family! The private bunkhouse has a 30" x 74" bunk bed and a 30" x 74"-fold-up bunk bed above a Jiffy sofa. Just outside the bunkhouse is a pantry big enough to store everyone's favorite snacks, and a full bathroom with a walk-in shower . The cooktop is just waiting for you to create a delicious meal, and the U-shaped dinette welcomes everyone to enjoy each meal in comfort, plus there is a large panoramic window for a perfect view of your surroundings. Any time of day you can kick back on the Versa-lounge and relax by the fireplace at the entertainment center. The exterior features a pass-through storage area for you to keep your outdoor camping gear stowed away when not in use and a 16' awning to protect you. The Salem Cruise Lite travel trailers are packed with hassle-free camping amenities! There are a variety of floorplans to choose from so you can find the best one to fit your needs. The enclosed Accessibelly will help protect against the elements and debris during transport, and the exterior retro/metal redesign is sure to be eye-catching! There are stylish roller shades inside, along with updated backsplash, elegant curtain rods and curtains, plus many more interior comforts! Choose a Salem Cruise Lite travel trailer today for quality and value!

item.title: Used 2020 Forest River RV Cherokee Grey Wolf 29TE
item.g:vehicle_option: Bunkhouse,Front Bedroom,Outdoor Kitchen,Two Entry/Exit Doors,U Shaped Dinette
item.g:description: Forest River Cherokee Grey Wolf travel trailer 29TE highlights: Dual Entry U-Shaped Dinette Outdoor Kitchen Walk-In Pantry Private Bunkhouse Your larger family will love spending weekends away with this Cherokee Grey Wolf travel trailer as their home away from home. This model offers sleeping for several comfortably with triple bunk beds in the rear private bunkhouse. In the front, there is a master suite with wardrobes and nightstands on either side of the queen bed, and it even has access to the dual-entry bath. The two entry doors will make accessing the trailer easy for everyone, and you will appreciate the abundant storage throughout this unit including large overhead cabinets, a walk-in pantry , plus numerous outside storage compartments for all of your outdoor gear. You also even have an outdoor kitchen ! All Forest River Cherokee Grey Wolf models are quality built with distinct features and superior comfort in mind, and they are all set at an affordable price point. So, when you get the opportunity to escape the hustle and bustle of everyday life to enjoy all the beauty and wonder that an outdoor adventure holds, the Cherokee Grey Wolf is ready and waiting to help you relax and unwind. Each unit features an outdoor shower with hot and cold water for you to get cleaned up without tracking mud throughout after your adventurous hike, and with the RVQ quick connect , you can easily hook up a low-pressure grill to cook up your best burgers outdoors. Inside, you will enjoy the HDMI entertainment center, the LED lighting throughout, and a kitchen skylight with a shade, and if you get tired of being indoors during inclement weather, the outdoor power awning will provide protection.

item.title: Used 2026 Forest River RV Salem FSX 178ICE
item.g:description: Forest River Salem FSX travel trailer 178ICE highlights: Front Queen Bed Two-Burner Cooktop 15' Power Awning Booth Dinette Slide Double-Size Bunks It will be so easy to enjoy time spent in this travel trailer for seven. The front queen bed provides a great night's rest, and there is an overhead cabinet to keep your things organized. Your guests or little ones can claim the double-size bunks for themselves, and there is a full bath adjacent to the bunks for easy nighttime use. A two-burner cooktop in the kitchen will let you make meals for your crew, and a refrigerator keeps leftovers fresh. You can dine at the booth dinette within the slide out or take your plate outdoors to sit under the 15' power awning. The Forest River Salem FSX travel trailers and toy hauler travel trailers are ultra comfortable and lightweight , perfect for first time or seasoned campers alike! You will love how easy it will be to relax with residential features that will make your space feel just like home, and the durable construction means you can enjoy your RV for years to come. There are a wide variety of floorplans to choose from, including couple's trailers, bunk models, and toy haulers, all with full bath and kitchen amenities and plenty of storage for all your gear!
